sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - MARGUERITE de Mello (-1360).

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - MARGUERITE de Mello Dame de l'Hermine, widow of MAURICE [VII] de Craon Seigneur de Sainte-Maure et de Marcillac, daughter of DREUX [IV] de Mello & his second wife Eléonore de Savoie (-1360).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Mello於1300年出生在法國皮卡迪奧易梅洛時，她的父親Dreux IV de MELLO46歲，母親Eléonore de SAVOIE28歲。她於1324年1月8日之前與Maurice VI de CRAON在法國皮卡迪索姆皮朋吉素爾-阿福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年12月25日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈隆-素-薩o享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Mello于1300年出生在法国皮卡迪奧易梅洛时，她的父亲Dreux IV de MELLO46岁，母亲Eléonore de SAVOIE28岁。她于1324年1月8日之前与Maurice VI de CRAON在法国皮卡迪索姆皮朋吉素爾-阿福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年12月25日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈隆-素-薩o享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mello
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Adelino, Ana, Joaquin, Acacio, Claudio, Cristina, Fernando, Americo, Enrique.  Portuguese Duarte, Joaquim, Armanda, Joao, Paulo, Serafim.
Italian: probably from a short form of a personal name ending with the hypocoristic suffix -ello, such as Giacomello from Giacomo .

variants.name: Giacomo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenico, Gino, Salvatore.
Italian: from the personal name Giacomo, from Latin Jacobus via Late Latin Jacomus (see James and Jacob ).

variants.name: Melle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Horst, Kurt, Otto.
Italian: habitational name from Melle in Cuneo province (Piedmont); in some cases possibly also a variant of a personal name such as   Mello   1.
Norwegian: probably a variant of   Mele  .

variants.name: Mellone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Emidio, Luigi, Pasquale.
Italian: from an augmentative of   Mello  .

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Mello was born in 1300, in Mello, Oise, Picardie, France, her father, Dreux IV de MELLO, was 46 and her mother, Eléonore de SAVOIE, was 28. She married Maurice VI de CRAON before 8 January 1324, in Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 25 December 1350, in Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Mello est née en 1300, à Mello, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Dreux IV de MELLO, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Eléonore de SAVOIE, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Maurice VI de CRAON avant 8 janvier 1324, à Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 décembre 1350, à Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Mello 1300 in Mello, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dreux IV de MELLO 46 und ihre Mutter Eléonore de SAVOIE 28. Sie hat vor 8. Januar 1324 in Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich Maurice VI de CRAON geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Dezember 1350 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Mello è nata il nel 1300 nel Mello, Oise, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Dreux IV de MELLO, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Eléonore de SAVOIE, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Maurice VI de CRAON prima del 8 gennaio 1324, nel Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 dicembre 1350, nel Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Melloが1300年にフランスピカーディオイゼメロで生まれた時，父Dreux IV de MELLOは46歳，母Eléonore de SAVOIEは28歳であった。1324年1月8日以前にフランスピカーディソンメピエレプオント-スル-アvアでMaurice VI de CRAONと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1350年12月25日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーチャロン-スル-サoンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Mello(이)가 1300년 프랑스 피카디 이스 멜로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dreux IV de MELLO(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eléonore de SAVOIE(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1324년 1월 8일 이전 프랑스 피카디 솜 피레폰트-수-아브르에서 Maurice VI de CRAON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 12월 25일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 차론-수-사o니에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Angers,49007,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la L: Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Mello nasceu em 1300, em Mello, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Dreux IV de MELLO, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Eléonore de SAVOIE, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Maurice VI de CRAON antes 8 de janeiro de 1324, em Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1350, em Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 50 anos.

ru.Angers,49007,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la L: ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Mello родилась в 1300 г. в местности меллоу, оис, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Dreux IV de MELLO было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Eléonore de SAVOIE, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maurice VI de CRAON перед 8 январь 1324 г. в местности пьиррепонт-сур-авр, сомм, пикарди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 25 декабря 1350 г. в местности халон-сур-саoн, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

es.Angers,49007,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la L: Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Mello nació en 1300, en Mello, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Dreux IV de MELLO, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Eléonore de SAVOIE, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Maurice VI de CRAON antes de 8 de enero de 1324, en Pierrepont-sur-Avre, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1350, en Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
